_publications._publicationTitle: SVA retrotransposon insertion-associated deletion represents a novel mutational mechanism underlying large genomic copy number changes with non-recurrent breakpoints.

_contextSnippet: Non-B DNA-forming sequences were identified within 53% of the deletion breakpoint-flanking fragments...However, when compared with a control sequence dataset, no overrepresentation of either non-B DNA-forming sequence motifs...was detectable
details: Identified non-B DNA-forming sequences within 53% of deletion breakpoint-flanking fragments but showed no overrepresentation compared to control dataset
